anti_claim: Batch8 validator checker verifies one exact copied non-secret validators.py body and its public checker exercise only. It does not authorize hosted-public release, publication, provider dispatch, model dispatch, source mutation, private-root equivalence, full validator-suite freshness, test completeness, or whole-system correctness.

allowed_public_inputs: exact copied non-secret validators.py macro body
source refs, digests, line counts, and required anchors
stable negative-case ids and validator verdicts

standard_payload.anti_purpose: A copied validator body inflated into release readiness, full validator-suite proof, hosted-public authority, provider dispatch, source authority, or private-root equivalence.
failure_modes: source module digest drifts from validators.py without a refreshed exact copy and manifest
copied source module lacks required anchors for policy, private-boundary, specimen, release-gate, or validate entrypoint checks
validator accepts missing source, poisoned policy, private-boundary blindness, missing specimen checks, missing release gates, or validate-entrypoint bypass
receipts include copied body text, raw operator transcripts, private refs, provider payload bodies, credentials, or live account state
capsule is treated as release, hosted-public, full validator-suite, source-mutation, private-root, provider, publication, or whole-system authority
standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe exact-copy validator checker capsule for one non-secret validators.py body and a synthetic public fixture set that exposes status-policy, private-boundary, specimen, release-gate, and validate-entrypoint checks while preserving claim ceilings.
standard_payload.teleology: Let a cold reader inspect and rerun real validator-checker mechanics over the non-secret validators.py macro body without granting release, provider, hosted-public, source-mutation, private-root, or full-suite authority.

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; existing authority_ceiling remains the operative claim ceiling.

validation_rules: require exactly one copied macro source module for idea_microcosm validators.py
verify source-to-target digest equality and required anchors for policy, private-boundary, specimen, release-gate, and validate entrypoint functions
execute the public validator checker exercise without invoking provider dispatch, model dispatch, hosted-public work, source mutation, or release lanes
require stable negative-case codes for missing validator source, poisoned policy, private-boundary blindness, missing specimen checks, missing release gates, and validate-entrypoint bypass
keep release, publication, hosted-public, provider dispatch, model dispatch, source mutation, full validator-suite freshness, private-root equivalence, and test-completeness authority false
keep copied source bodies under source_modules only; receipts may expose refs, digests, anchors, counts, verdicts, and omission receipts but not body text

author.purpose: create a valid Batch 8 Validator Checker capsule instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Batch 8 Validator Checker capsule without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_batch8_validator_checker_capsule and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are generated projections of this JSON source.

anti_claims: Batch8 validator checker verifies one exact copied non-secret validators.py body and its public checker exercise only. It does not authorize hosted-public release, publication, provider dispatch, model dispatch, source mutation, private-root equivalence, full validator-suite freshness, test completeness, or whole-system correctness.

Active v2 standard status is a source JSON contract state only; it does not expand release, publication, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, or whole-system correctness authority beyond the authority_ceiling.

runtime_acceptance_refs.uplift_basis: registry accepted_public_runtime_standard plus standard-local validator_contract, receipt_contract, source_refs, authority_ceiling, and public_private_boundary.
